questions.content: In the school store you see a 'sharpener'. Which item below has the SAME function category?
questions.explanation: sharpener 削笔器与 eraser 橡皮都是 修整/纠错 工具，B/C/D 是书写或承载文字的工具。

questions.content: Which group are ALL writing/drawing tools (no exception)?
questions.explanation: A 中四个都是直接书写/绘画工具；B 含 eraser/ruler；C 含 sharpener；D 中 paper/ink 不是工具本体。

questions.content: Listen and choose the correct meaning.
questions.audio_text: A dictionary is a thick book that explains the meaning of words.
questions.explanation: 听到 dictionary explains the meaning of words，是词典。

questions.content: What word means 'a small machine to make pencils sharp'?
questions.explanation: sharpener = 削笔器/卷笔刀。

questions.content: Listen and write the missing word: 'I keep all my pens and pencils in my new ______ ______ .' (两词，用空格)
questions.explanation: pencil case (also pencilcase / pencil-case) = 文具盒。
questions.audio_text: I keep all my pens and pencils in my new pencil case.

questions.content: Your father's brother is your ______.
questions.explanation: 父亲的兄弟称 uncle。

questions.content: Listen and choose the correct relationship.
questions.audio_text: My mother's mother is now seventy years old.
questions.explanation: 妈妈的妈妈是 grandmother（外婆）。

questions.content: Which sentence is RIGHT in family naming?
options: A. My father's sister is my aunt.
B. My mother's brother is my cousin.
C. My uncle's son is my brother.
D. My grandfather's wife is my aunt.
questions.explanation: 父亲的姐妹是 aunt（A 正确）。B 应是 uncle；C 应是 cousin；D 应是 grandmother。

questions.content: He fixes broken cars in his workshop. He is a ______.
questions.explanation: 修理工在工作间(workshop)做事的人，可填 worker。也接受 mechanic 但小学核心词为 worker。

questions.content: 「护士」对应的英文是______。
questions.explanation: nurse = 护士。

questions.content: Listen and choose what action is described.
questions.audio_text: After lunch, I usually take a short rest before doing my homework.
questions.explanation: 录音中说 take a short rest = 短暂休息一下。

questions.content: He brushes his ______ before going to bed every night.
questions.explanation: brush teeth = 刷牙，复数形式 teeth。

questions.content: Which sentence describes a MORNING routine?
options: A. I have dinner with my family.
B. I get up at half past six and wash my face.
C. The stars are shining in the sky.
D. I go to bed and read a story.
questions.explanation: B 起床洗脸 = 早晨；A 是晚餐；C/D 是夜晚。

questions.content: 「晚饭后」最自然的英文短语是 after ______.
questions.explanation: after dinner = 晚饭后；supper 多为口语，标准答案 dinner。

questions.content: Listen to the menu order and choose the drink.
questions.audio_text: I'd like a hamburger, some chips and a glass of orange juice.
questions.explanation: 录音中点的饮品是 a glass of orange juice。

questions.content: Which one is NOT a fruit?
questions.explanation: tomato 西红柿在生物学上是水果，但日常英语归为 vegetable。

questions.content: 「面条」的英文是______。
questions.explanation: noodles 一般以复数出现 = 面条。

questions.content: In the sentence 'Would you like ___ tea?', which word fits BEST?
questions.explanation: tea 不可数，肯定语气邀请用 some。

questions.content: Listen and choose the animal described.
questions.audio_text: It is the king of the forest. It is yellow and brown with a long tail.
questions.explanation: 森林之王 + 黄棕色 = lion 狮子。

questions.content: Which word names a PLANT, not an animal?
questions.explanation: bamboo 竹子是植物。

questions.content: 「熊猫」的英文是______。
questions.explanation: panda = 熊猫。

questions.content: Pandas eat ______ all day long.
questions.explanation: 熊猫吃竹子 bamboo（不可数，零冠词）。

questions.content: You can borrow books from a ______ .
questions.explanation: library 图书馆借书。

questions.content: Listen and choose where the person is going.
questions.audio_text: I want to send a letter to my friend, so I will go there now.
questions.explanation: 寄信去 post office 邮局。

questions.content: My father goes to work ______ subway every day.
questions.explanation: by + 交通工具（无冠词）= 乘…交通方式。

questions.content: 「机场」的英文是______。
questions.explanation: airport = 机场。

questions.content: Which date comes RIGHT after September 30?
questions.explanation: 九月只有 30 天，30 之后是 10 月 1 日 (October 1)。

questions.content: Listen and write the number you hear.
questions.audio_text: My grandmother is seventy-five years old.
questions.explanation: 听到 seventy-five = 75。

questions.content: Which day of the week is BEFORE Saturday?
questions.explanation: 周六前是 Friday 周五。

questions.content: The first month of a year is ______.
questions.explanation: 一年第一个月是 January。

questions.content: Mixing red and yellow gives the colour ______.
questions.explanation: 红+黄=橙色 orange。

questions.content: Which item is usually NOT in the shape of a circle?
questions.explanation: 窗户 window 多为长方形/正方形；硬币、钟面、球皆为圆形。

questions.content: Listen and choose the colour of the bag.
questions.audio_text: Look at the bag on the desk. It is purple, my favourite colour.
questions.explanation: 录音中说 It is purple 紫色。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: Tom and his sister ______ in Class Three. (be)
questions.explanation: 主语为复数 Tom and his sister，be 用 are。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: Each of the students ______ ready for the test.
questions.explanation: 主语 each of...为单数（each 后 of+复数仍单数），用 is。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: There ______ a book and two pens on the desk.
questions.explanation: there be 句型就近原则，最近主语 a book 单数，用 is。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: My family ______ very big. There are seven people in it.
questions.explanation: family 整体作单数主语，用 is。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: Listen and choose the correct subject form.
questions.audio_text: My friends and I are good students at school.
questions.explanation: My friends and I = we，所以 we are。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: Neither Lily nor her brothers ______ at home now.
questions.explanation: neither...nor... 就近原则，her brothers 复数，用 are。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: That pair of shoes ______ very nice. (是)
questions.explanation: a pair of shoes 视作整体单数，用 is。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: He ______ not from England. He's from Canada.
questions.explanation: 主语 He 用 is，否定 is not。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Mary often ______ to school by bike.
questions.explanation: 主语 Mary 第三人称单数，go→goes。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the sentence with the CORRECT verb form.
options: B. She watch TV every night.
C. My brother has lunch at noon.
D. They goes to school by bus.
questions.explanation: C 第三人称单数 has 正确；A 应为 doesn't；B 应为 watches；D 应为 go。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: He ______ his homework before dinner every day. (do)
questions.explanation: 主语第三人称单数 + 一般现在时，do→does。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Listen and choose the verb form you hear.
questions.audio_text: Lucy plays the piano very well, and she practises every day.
questions.explanation: 录音 Lucy plays，第三人称单数 plays。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: My father ______ (teach) maths in a middle school.
questions.explanation: teach 以 ch 结尾，第三人称单数加 -es → teaches。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the negative sentence with the RIGHT auxiliary.
questions.explanation: 实义动词的一般现在时否定，第三人称单数用 doesn't + 动词原形。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Sam usually ______ (have) breakfast at seven.
questions.explanation: have 的第三人称单数特殊形式 has。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Which adverb usually goes BEFORE the main verb?
questions.explanation: 频率副词 always 一般置于实义动词之前；now/tomorrow 等位置较灵活；yesterday 是过去时标志。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Look! The boys ______ football on the playground.
questions.explanation: Look! 是现在进行时标志，主语 boys 复数，用 are playing。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Listen and choose the action HAPPENING NOW.
questions.audio_text: Be quiet please. The baby is sleeping in the bedroom.
questions.explanation: 录音用 is sleeping 现在进行时。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: It ______ (rain) hard outside. We can't go out now.
questions.explanation: 现在进行时 is raining。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Which sentence is in the PRESENT CONTINUOUS tense?
options: A. He goes home at six.
B. He went home an hour ago.
C. He is going home now.
D. He will go home soon.
questions.explanation: is + V-ing = 现在进行时。A 一般现在；B 一般过去；D 一般将来。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Form the -ing of 'swim': ______
questions.explanation: 短元音+单辅音结尾，双写 m → swimming。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Choose the BEST sentence describing a picture of children eating.
options: B. The children are eating apples.
C. The children eat apples every day.
D. The children ate apples yesterday.
questions.explanation: 图片描述当下动作，用现在进行时 are eating。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Form the -ing of 'write': ______
questions.explanation: 以 e 结尾去 e 加 ing → writing。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: They ______ (have) an English class at this moment.
questions.explanation: at this moment 现在进行时；have 表示"上课"为动作，用 having。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Which time word does NOT match present continuous tense?
questions.explanation: usually 表示频率，搭配一般现在时；其他都是进行时标志。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Listen and identify the verb tense.
questions.audio_text: My sister always reads books in the evening.
questions.explanation: 录音中 always reads 是一般现在时。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Listen and choose the missing word.
questions.audio_text: The dog is running after the cat in the garden.
questions.explanation: 录音 is running 现在进行时。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: Choose the sentence with NO mistake.
options: A. I and my friend is at the gate.
B. There is two boys in the room.
D. The students isn't in the classroom.
questions.explanation: news 不可数单数 → is（C 正确）。A 应为 are；B 应为 are；D 应为 aren't。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the right form: He __ TV after dinner every evening.
questions.explanation: every evening 一般现在时，第三人称单数 watches。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Form the -ing of 'sit': ______
questions.explanation: 短元音+单辅音 → 双写 t → sitting。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Listen and complete: 'The students ______ in the library now.'
questions.audio_text: The students are reading in the library now.
questions.explanation: 录音 are reading 现在进行时。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: Which word is a CLUE for simple present tense?
questions.explanation: every week 是一般现在时频率标志。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: My pen ______ red, but my pencils ______ blue.
questions.explanation: 主语 pen 单数 is；pencils 复数 are。两空用逗号分隔。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: There ______ many beautiful flowers in the park last spring.
questions.explanation: last spring 过去时；主语 flowers 复数 → were。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: I ______ at home yesterday morning, but my brother ______ at school.
questions.explanation: 两个空主语都是单数，过去时 → was。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: Listen and choose the correct subject.
questions.audio_text: The teachers were very busy last weekend because of the school report.
questions.explanation: 录音中 The teachers were，主谓一致+过去时。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: Which sentence is the CORRECT past form of 'It is sunny today.'?
options: D. It will be sunny yesterday.
questions.explanation: 主语 It 单数 + 过去时 was。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: My parents ______ in Beijing last year.
questions.explanation: My parents 复数 + 过去时 → were。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: Listen and complete: 'The students ______ excited about the trip.'
questions.audio_text: The students were very excited about the school trip yesterday.
questions.explanation: 录音中 were，复数主语过去时。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: Which word is NOT a clue for the simple past?
questions.explanation: tomorrow 是将来时标志。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: There ______ a nice party in our school last Friday.
questions.explanation: 主语 a party 单数 + last Friday 过去 → was。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: It ______ cloudy and cold all day yesterday.
questions.explanation: It 单数 + yesterday 过去 → was。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: Choose the correct negative form.
options: D. They aren't at home yesterday.
questions.explanation: They were 的否定 → weren't。A 主谓不一致；C 实义动词形式不对；D 时态混乱。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Last weekend my family ______ to the countryside and ______ a great time. (go, have)
questions.explanation: 过去时不规则动词：go→went，have→had。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Tom ______ his homework before he watched TV.
questions.explanation: 前后两个动作都是过去，finish 规则动词加 -ed → finished。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Listen and choose the past form you hear.
questions.audio_text: They visited the Great Wall during the National Day holiday.
questions.explanation: 录音中 visited 过去式。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: What is the past tense of the verb 'buy'?
questions.explanation: buy 不规则变化 → bought。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the WRONG sentence.
options: A. She did her homework last night.
B. We saw a film yesterday.
C. He readed an interesting book.
D. They got up at six this morning.
questions.explanation: read 过去式不变形（仍写 read，但发音变 /red/），不能 readed。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: What is the past tense of 'stop'? ______
questions.explanation: stop 短元音+单辅音 → 双写 p + ed = stopped。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Listen and write the verb in the past tense.
questions.audio_text: My grandmother made a delicious cake for my birthday.
questions.explanation: 录音 made (make 的过去式)。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the BEST form: 'I ____ my keys this morning, but I found them later.'
questions.explanation: this morning 已过去 + lose 不规则 → lost。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Listen to the sentence and write the past form of 'come'. ______
questions.explanation: come→came。
questions.audio_text: He came back home very late last night.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: He ______ to Shanghai by plane two days ago.
questions.explanation: two days ago 过去 + fly 不规则 → flew。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the CORRECT past form of 'drink'.
questions.explanation: drink → drank → drunk；过去式是 drank。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: What is the past tense of 'do'? ______
questions.explanation: do→did。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Listen and choose the BEST answer to: 'What did Tom do yesterday?'
questions.audio_text: Yesterday Tom played basketball with his classmates after school, and then he went home and did his homework.
options: C. He played basketball and did homework.
D. He went to the cinema.
questions.explanation: 录音中 Tom 打篮球+做作业。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Which sentence is in the SIMPLE PAST tense?
options: A. I have a cat at home.
B. She is reading a book.
C. We went to the zoo last Sunday.
questions.explanation: went + last Sunday 是一般过去时。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: What is the past tense of 'see'? ______
questions.explanation: see→saw。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the BEST clue word for the past tense.
questions.explanation: last weekend 是过去时间。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Listen to the sentence and write the past form of 'eat'. ______
questions.explanation: eat→ate。
questions.audio_text: She ate a bowl of noodles for lunch yesterday.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Listen and answer: 'Where did Lily go last summer?'
questions.audio_text: Last summer Lily went to Sanya with her parents and they had a great time at the beach.
questions.explanation: 录音中 Lily 去 Sanya 三亚。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the CORRECT negative form.
options: C. He doesn't go home yesterday.
questions.explanation: didn't + 动词原形 = 一般过去否定。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: Listen and write the missing word: '______ you at the cinema last night?'
questions.audio_text: Were you at the cinema last night with your friends?
questions.explanation: 主语 you + 过去时 → Were。首字母大写。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Which question is the CORRECT past general question for 'He played football yesterday.'?
options: A. Does he play football yesterday?
B. Did he played football yesterday?
C. Did he play football yesterday?
D. Was he played football yesterday?
questions.explanation: 过去一般疑问 Did + 主语 + 动词原形。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: What is the past tense of 'take'? ______
questions.explanation: take→took。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Choose the form of 'study' in past tense.
questions.explanation: 辅音字母+y 结尾 → 改 y 为 i 加 ed → studied。

questions.content: Which sentence is a CORRECT statement (declarative sentence)?
options: C. The sun rises in the east.
questions.explanation: 陈述句叙述事实，C 正确；A 疑问；B 祈使；D 感叹。

questions.content: Rearrange to make a statement: 'beautiful / a / Lily / has / dress'.
options: A. Lily a beautiful dress has.
B. Has Lily a beautiful dress.
C. Lily has a beautiful dress.
D. A beautiful Lily has dress.
questions.explanation: 陈述句结构：主语+谓语+宾语。

questions.content: Choose the sentence with the CORRECT word order.
options: A. I usually walk to school in the morning.
B. I to school walk usually in the morning.
C. Usually I walk in the morning to school.
D. In the morning I to school walk usually.
questions.explanation: 频率副词 usually 置于实义动词前，地点先于时间状语。

questions.content: My sister has _____ small cat. _____ cat is white.
questions.explanation: 首次提到用 a；再次提到用 The（特指）。

questions.content: Make a statement: 'There is / / a book / on the desk'. The complete sentence is ______
questions.answer: There is a book on the desk
questions.explanation: 陈述句把零散成分整合：There is a book on the desk.

questions.content: Change to a yes/no question: 'They are good friends.'
options: C. Do they are good friends?
questions.explanation: be 动词提到主语前 → Are they good friends?

questions.content: Listen and answer the question with YES or NO.
questions.audio_text: Question: Does Tom like apples? Tom likes apples very much.
questions.explanation: 录音中 Tom likes apples，肯定回答 Yes, he does.

questions.content: Choose the BEST yes/no question for: 'She watches TV every night.'
options: A. Is she watch TV every night?
B. Do she watches TV every night?
C. Does she watch TV every night?
D. Does she watches TV every night?
questions.explanation: 实义动词第三人称单数一般疑问：Does + 主语 + 动词原形。

questions.content: Make a yes/no question of: 'He can swim.' → ______ he swim?
questions.explanation: 情态动词 can 提前 → Can he swim?

questions.content: Make a yes/no question of: 'They went to the park yesterday.'
options: A. Do they go to the park yesterday?
B. Did they went to the park yesterday?
C. Did they go to the park yesterday?
D. Were they go to the park yesterday?
questions.explanation: 过去一般疑问：Did + 主语 + 动词原形。

questions.content: Choose the BEST short answer to: 'Are you Chinese?' (你是中国人，肯定回答)
questions.explanation: be 动词一般疑问的肯定简短回答：Yes, I am.（简略形式不能用于肯定回答末尾）

questions.content: Fill the WH-word: '______ are you doing now?' — 'I am reading.'
questions.explanation: 答 reading 是动作，问动作用 What...doing。

questions.content: Fill the WH-word: '______ does he live?' — 'In Beijing.'
questions.explanation: 答地点 in Beijing → 用 Where。

questions.content: Fill the WH-word: '______ is your birthday?' — 'It's on May 6.'
questions.explanation: 答日期 May 6 → 用 When。

questions.content: Make a WH-question: 'I go to school by bus.' → '____ do you go to school?'
questions.explanation: 问交通方式 by bus 用 How。

questions.content: Listen and choose the question word that fits.
questions.audio_text: Mary will buy the new dress because it is on sale this weekend.
questions.explanation: 录音解释了"原因" because…，提问用 Why。

questions.content: Choose the BEST WH-question: 'Tom is twelve years old.'
questions.explanation: 问年龄用 How old。

questions.content: Make a WH-question for: 'There are five books on the desk.' (问数量)
options: A. How many book are there on the desk?
B. How many books are there on the desk?
C. How much books are there on the desk?
D. How many books there are on the desk?
questions.explanation: How many + 复数名词 + are there + 地点。

questions.content: Fill: '____ is that pencil case?' '它是 Tom 的。'
questions.explanation: 问物品所属用 Whose。

questions.content: Make negative: 'I have many books.' → 'I ______ many books.'
questions.explanation: 实义动词 + 主语 I → don't have。

questions.content: Make negative: 'She is from England.' → 'She ______ from England.'
questions.explanation: be 动词 is 否定 → isn't。

questions.content: Choose the WRONG negative sentence.
options: C. We don't go there last week.
D. She didn't go to school yesterday.
questions.explanation: last week 过去 → didn't go，C 错。

questions.content: Listen and choose the negative sentence you hear.
questions.audio_text: Mary doesn't like coffee, but she loves green tea.
questions.explanation: 录音 Mary doesn't like coffee。

questions.content: Make negative: 'There were some apples on the table.'
options: A. There weren't any apples on the table.
B. There weren't some apples on the table.
C. There wasn't some apples on the table.
D. There aren't any apples on the table.
questions.explanation: 否定句 some → any，weren't 保持复数过去。

questions.content: Choose the negative form of 'He can play the piano.'
options: A. He can play not the piano.
B. He doesn't can play the piano.
C. He can not play the piano.
D. He no can play the piano.
questions.explanation: 情态动词 can 否定 = can not / cannot / can't。

questions.content: Choose the negative form of 'I went there last weekend.'
options: A. I don't go there last weekend.
B. I didn't went there last weekend.
C. I didn't go there last weekend.
D. I wasn't go there last weekend.
questions.explanation: didn't + 动词原形 go。

questions.content: There ______ a lot of milk in the bottle.
questions.explanation: milk 不可数 + a lot of 看主语 → is。

questions.content: There ______ two cats and a dog in the garden.
questions.explanation: there be 就近原则，最近主语 two cats 复数 → are。

questions.content: Listen and choose what you hear.
questions.audio_text: There are some students playing football on the playground after school.
options: A. There is a student playing football.
B. There are some students playing football.
C. There were some students playing football.
D. There aren't any students playing football.
questions.explanation: 录音 There are some students playing football。

questions.content: Change to past: 'There is a teacher in the classroom.'
options: A. There is a teacher in the classroom yesterday.
B. There has a teacher in the classroom yesterday.
C. There was a teacher in the classroom yesterday.
D. There were a teacher in the classroom yesterday.
questions.explanation: there be 过去：There was/were。单数 → was。

questions.content: Fill: 'There ______ any water in the bottle.' (否定，现在)
questions.explanation: water 不可数 + 否定 → isn't any。

questions.content: Make a yes/no question: 'There is a hospital near here.'
options: A. Is there a hospital near here?
B. Are there a hospital near here?
C. Does there a hospital near here?
D. There is a hospital near here?
questions.explanation: there be 一般疑问：Is/Are there ...?

questions.content: How many ______ are there in your class? (boy 的复数)
questions.explanation: How many + 复数可数名词。

questions.content: Listen and choose the BEST reply.
questions.audio_text: Good morning, Lily. Nice to see you again.
options: B. Nice to see you, too.
questions.explanation: Nice to see you 的回答 Nice to see you, too.

questions.content: Fill: 'Good ______!' (早上 7 点的问候)
questions.explanation: 早上 7 点 = Good morning。

questions.content: Which is NOT a way to say goodbye?
questions.explanation: Good morning 是问候语，不是道别。

questions.content: Fill in the blank: 'How are you today?' '______ , thank you.'
questions.explanation: How are you 的标准回答：Fine/Good, thank you.

questions.content: Listen and choose the speaker's intent.
questions.audio_text: It is late now. Good night and have sweet dreams.
questions.explanation: Good night + sweet dreams = 睡前道别。

questions.content: Choose the BEST first-meeting greeting.
questions.explanation: How do you do 用于初次见面的正式问候。

questions.content: Listen and fill: 'See ______ tomorrow!'
questions.explanation: See you tomorrow = 明天见。
questions.audio_text: OK then, see you tomorrow at the bus stop.

questions.content: Choose the BEST reply to 'Long time no see.'
questions.explanation: Long time no see 多以问候回应：How are you?

questions.content: Listen to the introduction. Where does the speaker live?
questions.audio_text: Hello, my name is Anna. I am eleven years old. I come from Canada and I live in Toronto.
questions.explanation: 录音中 I live in Toronto。

questions.content: Choose the BEST introduction:
options: A. This is my friend Lily.
B. This are my friend Lily.
C. He am my friend Lily.
questions.explanation: 介绍他人用 This is …。

questions.content: Fill: '______ is your name?' 'My name is Tom.'
questions.explanation: 问姓名 What.

questions.content: Choose the BEST question to ask someone's age.
questions.explanation: How old are you 问年龄。

questions.content: Listen and answer: 'How old is Anna?'
questions.audio_text: Hi, this is Anna. She is twelve years old and she likes drawing.
questions.explanation: 录音 She is twelve years old.

questions.content: Choose the BEST way to ask 'Where are you from?'
options: A. Where are you come from?
B. Where do you come from?
D. Where are you from come?
questions.explanation: 或 Where are you from?；选项中正确的是 Where do you come from?

questions.content: Fill: 'Nice to meet you.' '______ to meet you, too.'
questions.explanation: 标准回答 Nice to meet you, too.

questions.content: Listen and write the speaker's hobby (one word).
questions.audio_text: My hobby is drawing. I like to draw animals and flowers in my free time.
questions.explanation: 录音中 My hobby is drawing.

questions.content: Choose the BEST polite request.
options: B. Could you please pass me the book?
C. You give me the book.
D. I want your book now.
questions.explanation: Could you please... 是礼貌请求。

questions.content: Listen and choose the BEST reply.
questions.audio_text: Excuse me, could you tell me the way to the post office?
options: B. Sure, go straight and turn left at the bank.
questions.explanation: 对方问路，回应应给出方向。

questions.content: Fill: 'Thank you for your help.' '______ welcome.'
questions.explanation: You're welcome / You are welcome 是常见回应。

questions.content: Choose the BEST way to say 'I need help with this question.'
options: B. Could you help me with this question?
C. You help me question, please.
questions.explanation: Could you help me with sth. 是标准请求帮助。

questions.content: Choose the BEST polite reply: 'Thanks a lot.'
questions.explanation: Thanks 的回应 You're welcome。

questions.content: Listen and choose what the speaker is asking for.
questions.audio_text: Excuse me, may I borrow your pen for a moment?
options: B. asking to borrow a pen
questions.explanation: 录音 may I borrow your pen 借笔。

questions.content: Choose the BEST way to apologise after making a mistake.
questions.explanation: 道歉用 I'm sorry。

questions.content: Fill: 'May I ______ your pencil, please?' (借)
questions.explanation: 借入用 borrow（借出 lend）。

questions.content: Listen and choose what the speaker likes.
questions.audio_text: My favourite sport is basketball. I play it with my classmates after school.
questions.explanation: 录音 My favourite sport is basketball。

questions.content: Choose the BEST sentence: '我最喜欢的颜色是蓝色。'
options: A. My favourite color is blue.
B. I like color blue most.
C. My most colour is blue.
D. The color blue is favourite.
questions.explanation: My favourite + 名词 + is + 内容 是地道说法。

questions.content: Fill: 'I like apples ______ I don't like pears.'
questions.explanation: 前后语义对比，用 but。

questions.content: Choose the BEST way to express dislike.
options: B. I don't like rainy days.
C. I like rainy days a lot.
questions.explanation: don't like 直接表达不喜欢。

questions.content: Listen and answer: 'What is Tom's favourite food?'
questions.audio_text: Tom likes hamburgers very much, but his favourite food is dumplings.
questions.explanation: 录音中明确 his favourite food is dumplings.

questions.content: Choose the BEST sentence: 'My sister likes singing. ______'
questions.explanation: 日常交际表达"我也是"用 Me too。

questions.content: Choose the BEST way to ask preference.
options: A. Which do you like, apples or oranges?
B. What you like apples or oranges?
C. Do you like which one apples or oranges?
D. You like apples or oranges?
questions.explanation: Which + do you like, A or B 是选择问句。

questions.content: Fill: 'What is your ______ subject at school?' (最喜欢的)
questions.explanation: favourite (英) / favorite (美) 都接受。

questions.content: Choose the WRONG sentence about preferences.
options: A. I prefer tea to coffee.
C. I love play computer games.
D. My favourite season is summer.
questions.explanation: love + 动名词 → love playing；love play 错误。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 1:

My name is Tom and I am twelve years old. I live in a small town with my parents and my sister Lily. Last Saturday was a wonderful day for our family. We got up early and drove to the countryside. The weather was sunny and warm. My father took us to a farm owned by Uncle Bill. There were many animals on the farm: cows, sheep, ducks and chickens. Lily was very excited because she had never seen so many animals before. We helped Uncle Bill feed the chickens and pick fresh apples from the trees. At noon, Aunt Mary cooked a big lunch for us. We had vegetable soup, bread, eggs and apple pie. After lunch, we played football on the green field with Uncle Bill's children. In the afternoon, we went fishing in the small river behind the farm. I caught two fish and Lily caught one. We came back home in the evening, tired but very happy. I will never forget that wonderful day on the farm.

Question 1: How old is Tom?
questions.explanation: 原文 'I am twelve years old'。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 1:

My name is Tom and I am twelve years old. I live in a small town with my parents and my sister Lily. Last Saturday was a wonderful day for our family. We got up early and drove to the countryside. The weather was sunny and warm. My father took us to a farm owned by Uncle Bill. There were many animals on the farm: cows, sheep, ducks and chickens. Lily was very excited because she had never seen so many animals before. We helped Uncle Bill feed the chickens and pick fresh apples from the trees. At noon, Aunt Mary cooked a big lunch for us. We had vegetable soup, bread, eggs and apple pie. After lunch, we played football on the green field with Uncle Bill's children. In the afternoon, we went fishing in the small river behind the farm. I caught two fish and Lily caught one. We came back home in the evening, tired but very happy. I will never forget that wonderful day on the farm.

Question 2: Where did Tom's family go last Saturday?
options: C. to a farm in the countryside
questions.explanation: 原文 'drove to the countryside ... a farm owned by Uncle Bill'。

Question 3: Who cooked lunch for Tom's family?
questions.explanation: 'Aunt Mary cooked a big lunch'。

Question 4: How many fish did Tom and Lily catch in total?
questions.explanation: Tom caught 2, Lily caught 1, total 3.

Reading Passage 1:

My name is Tom and I am twelve years old. I live in a small town with my parents and my sister Lily. Last Saturday was a wonderful day for our family. We got up early and drove to the countryside. The weather was sunny and warm. My father took us to a farm owned by Uncle Bill. There were many animals on the farm: cows, sheep, ducks and chickens. Lily was very excited because she had never seen so many animals before. We helped Uncle Bill feed the chickens and pick fresh apples from the trees. At noon, Aunt Mary cooked a big lunch for us. I caught two fish and Lily caught one. We came back home in the evening, tired but very happy. I will never forget that wonderful day on the farm.

Question 5: Which word BEST describes Tom's feeling about that day?
questions.explanation: 末句 'tired but very happy' 直接对应。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 2:

The giant panda is one of the most famous animals in the world. It is also the symbol of China. Pandas live mainly in the bamboo forests of southwest China, especially in Sichuan, Shaanxi and Gansu. A grown-up panda is about 1.5 metres long and weighs about 100 kilograms. It has a round face, black ears and big black eye patches. Its body is white, but its arms and legs are black. Pandas eat bamboo for almost the whole day. They may spend twelve hours a day eating, and they need more than ten kilograms of bamboo to stay healthy. Although pandas look heavy, they can climb trees very well. Sometimes they also eat small animals or fish, but bamboo is their main food. Pandas are an endangered species. There are not many wild pandas left, so the Chinese government and many scientists work hard to protect them. Every year, more and more baby pandas are born in the panda research centres. People around the world love pandas because they are cute, lovely and very friendly.

Question 1: Which province is NOT mentioned as a home of pandas?
questions.explanation: 原文只列 Sichuan, Shaanxi and Gansu。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 2:

There are not many wild pandas left, so the Chinese government and many scientists work hard to protect them. Every year, more and more baby pandas are born in the panda research centres. People around the world love pandas because they are cute, lovely and very friendly.

Question 2: A grown-up panda weighs about ______ kilograms.
questions.explanation: 'weighs about 100 kilograms'。

Question 3: How many hours a day do pandas spend eating?
questions.explanation: 'They may spend twelve hours a day eating'。

Question 4: What is the MAIN food of pandas?
questions.explanation: 全文反复强调主食是 bamboo。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 2:

The giant panda is one of the most famous animals in the world. It is also the symbol of China. Pandas live mainly in the bamboo forests of southwest China, especially in Sichuan, Shaanxi and Gansu. A grown-up panda is about 1.5 metres long and weighs about 100 kilograms. It has a round face, black ears and big black eye patches. Its body is white, but its arms and legs are black. Pandas eat bamboo for almost the whole day. They may spend twelve hours a day eating, and they need more than ten kilograms of bamboo to stay healthy. Although pandas look heavy, they can climb trees very well. Sometimes they also eat small animals or fish, but bamboo is their main food. Pandas are an endangered species. There are not many wild pandas left, so the Chinese government and many scientists work hard to protect them. Every year, more and more baby pandas are born in the panda research centres. People around the world love pandas because they are cute, lovely and very friendly.

Question 5: According to the passage, which sentence is TRUE?
options: B. There are many wild pandas left.
C. Pandas can climb trees very well.
D. Pandas are dangerous to humans.
questions.explanation: 原文 'they can climb trees very well'；A 错（也吃小动物或鱼）；B 错（数量少）；D 文中说 friendly。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 3:

Lucy is a sixth-grade student at Sunshine Primary School. Every weekday she gets up at six thirty and has breakfast with her family at seven. Her mother always makes warm milk and bread for her. After breakfast, Lucy walks to school with her best friend Emma. The school is only ten minutes away from her home. Classes start at eight in the morning. Lucy has six classes every day: Chinese, Maths, English, Science, Art and PE. Her favourite subject is English because the teacher tells funny stories and plays games with the students. At noon Lucy has lunch in the school dining hall. The lunch usually has rice, vegetables and meat or fish. After school, Lucy stays at the library to finish her homework. She also borrows books about animals because she wants to be a scientist when she grows up. At five o'clock she goes home and helps her mother in the kitchen. After dinner she practises the piano for half an hour and then reads stories for fun. She goes to bed at nine thirty. Lucy thinks her school life is busy but full of fun.

Question 1: What time does Lucy have breakfast?
questions.explanation: 'has breakfast with her family at seven'。

Question 2: Which subject does Lucy like BEST?
questions.explanation: 'Her favourite subject is English'。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 4:

There are four seasons in a year: spring, summer, autumn and winter. Each season has its own colour and feeling. In spring, everything wakes up. The trees turn green and flowers start to open. People often go on picnics or fly kites in the park. The weather is warm but sometimes rainy. Summer is the hottest season. The sun shines brightly and the days become very long. Many children love summer because they have the long summer holiday. They go swimming, eat ice cream and play under the trees. Autumn comes after summer. The leaves turn yellow or red and fall to the ground. Farmers are busy because it is the harvest time. Apples, pears and rice are ready to be picked or cut. Winter is the coldest season. In the north of China, it often snows and lakes are frozen. Children make snowmen and have snowball fights. Some animals, like bears, sleep through the whole winter. Different people like different seasons. Which one do you like best?

Question 1: How many seasons are mentioned?
questions.explanation: 'There are four seasons in a year'。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 4:

There are four seasons in a year: spring, summer, autumn and winter. Each season has its own colour and feeling. In spring, everything wakes up. The trees turn green and flowers start to open. People often go on picnics or fly kites in the park. The weather is warm but sometimes rainy. Summer is the hottest season. The sun shines brightly and the days become very long. Many children love summer because they have the long summer holiday. They go swimming, eat ice cream and play under the trees. Autumn comes after summer. The leaves turn yellow or red and fall to the ground. Farmers are busy because it is the harvest time. Apples, pears and rice are ready to be picked or cut. Winter is the coldest season. In the north of China, it often snows and lakes are frozen. Children make snowmen and have snowball fights. Some animals, like bears, sleep through the whole winter. Different people like different seasons. Which one do you like best?

Question 2: According to the passage, what do farmers do in autumn?
questions.explanation: 'it is the harvest time. Apples, pears and rice are ready to be picked or cut'。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 4:

There are four seasons in a year: spring, summer, autumn and winter. Each season has its own colour and feeling. In spring, everything wakes up. The trees turn green and flowers start to open. People often go on picnics or fly kites in the park. The weather is warm but sometimes rainy. Summer is the hottest season. The sun shines brightly and the days become very long. Many children love summer because they have the long summer holiday. They go swimming, eat ice cream and play under the trees. Autumn comes after summer. The leaves turn yellow or red and fall to the ground. Farmers are busy because it is the harvest time. Apples, pears and rice are ready to be picked or cut. Winter is the coldest season. In the north of China, it often snows and lakes are frozen. Children make snowmen and have snowball fights. Some animals, like bears, sleep through the whole winter. Different people like different seasons. Which one do you like best?

Question 3: In summer, the days are very ______.
questions.explanation: 'the days become very long'。

questions.content:
Reading Passage 4:

There are four seasons in a year: spring, summer, autumn and winter. Each season has its own colour and feeling. In spring, everything wakes up. The trees turn green and flowers start to open. People often go on picnics or fly kites in the park. The weather is warm but sometimes rainy. Summer is the hottest season. The sun shines brightly and the days become very long. Many children love summer because they have the long summer holiday. They go swimming, eat ice cream and play under the trees. Autumn comes after summer. The leaves turn yellow or red and fall to the ground. Farmers are busy because it is the harvest time. Apples, pears and rice are ready to be picked or cut. Winter is the coldest season. In the north of China, it often snows and lakes are frozen. Children make snowmen and have snowball fights. Some animals, like bears, sleep through the whole winter. Different people like different seasons. Which one do you like best?

Question 4: Which season is the COLDEST according to the passage?
questions.explanation: 'Winter is the coldest season'。

questions.content:
Read this short text and choose the BEST title:

'My grandfather lives in the village. He has a small garden. He grows vegetables and flowers there. Every morning, he waters the plants and feeds the chickens. He is over seventy years old, but he is very healthy because he loves working in the garden.'
questions.explanation: 短文围绕祖父的园艺生活与健康，A 概括最贴切。

questions.content:
Read and answer:

'David is good at playing the violin. Every Saturday morning he goes to a music class in the city centre. The class lasts two hours. After class, he often eats lunch in a small restaurant near the music school.'

Question: How long is David's music class?
questions.explanation: 'The class lasts two hours'。

questions.content:
Read and answer:

'Sam likes sports. He plays football on Mondays, plays basketball on Wednesdays, and goes swimming on Fridays. On weekends he often watches sports games on TV with his father.'

Which sport does Sam play on Wednesday?
questions.explanation: 'plays basketball on Wednesdays'。

questions.content:
Listen to a short story and choose the BEST answer.

Question: What did Mary buy at the supermarket?
questions.audio_text: Yesterday Mary went to the supermarket near her home. She bought some bread, two bottles of milk and a small box of eggs.
questions.explanation: 录音中买了 bread, milk, eggs。

questions.content: Listen and answer: Where will the school trip be?
questions.audio_text: This Friday our class will go to the science museum in the city. We will visit the dinosaur exhibition and learn about the history of the earth.
questions.explanation: 录音明确 the science museum.

questions.content:
Read this dialogue and answer.

A: Hi Lily, what's the matter with you?
B: I have a bad cold and a fever. I feel terrible.
A: You should drink lots of water and stay in bed.

Question: What's wrong with Lily?
options: B. She has a stomach ache.
C. She has a cold and a fever.
questions.explanation: 对话中 Lily 说 'I have a bad cold and a fever'。

questions.content:
Read and fill the blank:

'Tony often goes to school by bike. But today his bike is broken, so he ______ to school by bus.' (一个词)
questions.explanation: 上下文每天 + today 一般现在；主语单数 → goes。

questions.content:
Read this email and answer.

'Dear Mum, I arrived in Beijing this morning. The hotel is very nice and the weather is sunny. Tomorrow I will go to the Great Wall with my friends. I miss you and Dad very much. Love, Anna.'

Where is Anna staying?
options: C. in a hotel in Beijing
questions.explanation: 'I arrived in Beijing... The hotel is very nice'。

questions.content:
Read this notice and answer.

'Spring Sports Meeting\nDate: April 15, Saturday\nPlace: school playground\nTime: 8:30 a.m. – 4:00 p.m.\nAll students must wear sports shoes.'

What MUST students wear?
questions.explanation: 通知最后一句 'must wear sports shoes'。

questions.content: Listen to a weather report and choose the BEST answer.
questions.audio_text: Good morning. Here is the weather report. Today will be cloudy with a little rain in the afternoon. The temperature is from twelve to eighteen degrees.
questions.explanation: 录音 cloudy with a little rain。

questions.content:
Read and answer:

'My uncle is a tall, strong man. He works in a hospital. He helps doctors take care of sick people every day. He works hard and many people like him.'

What is his job?
questions.explanation: 在医院 + 帮助医生照顾病人 → nurse 男护士。

questions.content:
Listen to a phone message and answer.

Question: When will the class meeting start?
questions.audio_text: Hi class, this is your teacher. Don't forget our class meeting tomorrow afternoon at three o'clock in Room 201.
questions.explanation: 录音 'tomorrow afternoon at three o'clock'。

questions.content:
Read and choose the BEST word:

'Hurry up! The film ______ in five minutes!'
questions.explanation: in + 时间 表示将来 → will start。

questions.content: Read and fill: 'The new shop is ______ a bookshop and a coffee café.' (用 between 或 among)
questions.explanation: 两者之间 between A and B；三者及以上 among。

questions.content: 「黑色」对应的英文是______。
questions.explanation: black = 黑色。

questions.content: Make a statement: rearrange 'is / a / new / it / book' → ______
questions.explanation: 陈述句结构 主语+谓语+宾语：It is a new book.

_quality_meta.deprecated_reason: 英语切剑桥 PET/FCE/CAE 体系，外研社老英语 chapter 体系不再使用
_quality_meta.note: 抽题已通过 _activeSourceFilter 自动排除；保留作低水平兜底参考，但不应作锚点/训练样本
